S.FORM: Warren Ajax sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1921, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 5, Warren Ajax, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2004) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: warren ajax s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, warren ajax, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
